allow: PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($c\) { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force; "stopped dev server PID $\($c.OwningProcess\)" } else { "nothing on :5000" })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($c\) { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force; "freed :5000 \(stopped PID $\($c.OwningProcess\)\) — you can run 'npm run dev' now" } else { ":5000 is free" })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($c\) { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force; Start-Sleep 2; "stopped old dev \(PID $\($c.OwningProcess\)\)" } else { ":5000 free" })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($c\) { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force; Start-Sleep 2; "restarting dev" } else { "free" })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($c\) { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force; Start-Sleep 2; "stopped, restarting" } else { "free" })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($c\) { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force; Start-Sleep 2; "restarting" } else { "free" })
